thoughtSummary: Rex Dominion is furious about Rookie Blaze's interference last week. He wants Blaze kept out of his match — his manager's message made that clear.
Steel Purity is determined to fight clean. He's annoyed by the chaos Blaze has been causing and wants to prove the better man wins without tricks.
Slick Vince is worried. He embarrassed Maddox last week with a sneak attack and knows Maddox is coming for him. He's plotting his escape route.
Iron Maddox is seething. Vince humiliated him and he wants blood — no running, no hiding, just a brawl.
Dazzle King is in good spirits. He's been left out of the drama so far and sees an opportunity to steal the show from everyone.
Rookie Blaze turned heel and is riding it. He cost both Rex and Steel last week and he's proud of it — he's hoping to find another opportunity to cause chaos tonight.
